name: xterm package migration

issues.title: Tech debt: Migrate desktop app from legacy 'xterm' package to '@xterm/xterm' namespace

note: Carries the xterm.js namespace migration that was queued for v0.5.4 but deferred when the package.json swap couldn't be lockfile-resolved on the local machine (Windows Defender pnpm install block). Ship when the Defender exclusions land or from a Linux host.
